# projectsites-template (v3.0.0)

> Production-ready cinematic website template built for AI customization. Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind + React Router. Single source of truth in `_brand.json` (W3C DTCG format). 15 universal routes, 15 composable section components, вҢҳK palette, full PWA kit, 5+ JSON-LD blocks per page.

This file is the **full content manifest** вҖ” every component, page, token, and customization pattern in one place. Designed for LLM agents to consume without needing to walk the codebase.

Companion files:
- [llms.txt](./llms.txt) вҖ” short index
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/heymegabyte/template.projectsites.dev/blob/main/AGENTS.md) вҖ” cross-IDE contract
- [docs/](https://github.com/heymegabyte/template.projectsites.dev/tree/main/docs) вҖ” structured reference

---

## Mental model

```
_brand.json (DTCG tokens)
    вҶ“
src/brand.ts (resolver вҖ” applies CSS custom properties at boot)
    вҶ“
:root CSS variables  вҶҗ  src/index.css  вҶҗ  tailwind.config.ts
    вҶ“
src/components/* (every component reads `bg-accent`, `text-text-muted` etc.)
    вҶ“
src/pages/* (compose sections)
    вҶ“
src/App.tsx (15 routes wrapped in Layout)
```

Edit `_brand.json` to rebrand. Edit `src/pages/*.tsx` to set copy. Everything else cascades.

---

## File index

```
.bolt/                       bolt.diy meta вҖ” DO NOT EDIT
в”ңв”Җв”Җ prompt
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ignore
в””в”Җв”Җ config.json
.github/
в””в”Җв”Җ copilot-instructions.md  GitHub Copilot config (points at AGENTS.md)
.cursorrules                 Legacy Cursor config (points at AGENTS.md)
.windsurfrules               Windsurf config (points at AGENTS.md)
AGENTS.md                    Cross-IDE agent contract вҖ” read first
CLAUDE.md                    Claude-specific architecture doc
README.md                    Human-facing intro
CHANGELOG.md                 Release history
_brand.json                  Single source of truth (W3C DTCG)
docs/                        Structured reference library
в”ңв”Җв”Җ README.md                Doc index
в”ңв”Җв”Җ AGENTS.md вҶ’ ../AGENTS.md
в”ңв”Җв”Җ AI_GUIDE.md              LLM-specific patterns + decision trees
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ARCHITECTURE.md          How the pieces fit together
в”ңв”Җв”Җ BRAND.md                 _brand.json complete reference
в”ңв”Җв”Җ COMPONENTS.md            Section component catalog
в”ңв”Җв”Җ PAGES.md                 Route catalog
в”ңв”Җв”Җ RECIPES.md               Copy-paste customizations
в”ңв”Җв”Җ THEMING.md               Light/dark/auto + hue rotation
в”ңв”Җв”Җ SEO.md                   JSON-LD + GEO + AI search
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ACCESSIBILITY.md         WCAG 2.2 AA checklist
в”ңв”Җв”Җ DECISIONS.md             Architectural decisions
в”ңв”Җв”Җ GLOSSARY.md              Terminology
в””в”Җв”Җ profiles/                Industry-specific guides
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ saas.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ restaurant.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ portfolio.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ agency.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ medical.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ legal.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ nonprofit.md
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ retail.md
    в””в”Җв”Җ local-service.md
examples/                    Drop-in _brand.json presets
в”ңв”Җв”Җ README.md
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.saas.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.restaurant.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.portfolio.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.agency.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.medical.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.legal.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.nonprofit.json
в”ңв”Җв”Җ _brand.retail.json
в””в”Җв”Җ _brand.local-service.json
src/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ brand.ts                 Token resolver
в”ңв”Җв”Җ main.tsx                 Entry (calls applyBrand)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ App.tsx                  15 routes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ index.css                @layer base + utilities (OKLCH)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ components/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Layout.tsx           Page chrome wrapper
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Header.tsx           Sticky nav + вҢҳK + ThemeToggle
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Footer.tsx           4-col footer
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CommandPalette.tsx   Universal вҢҳK palette
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ThemeToggle.tsx      Dark / light / auto cycle
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Lightbox.tsx         PhotoSwipe auto-mount
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ JsonLd.tsx           Safe JSON-LD renderer
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ sections/            15 composable section components
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ HeroVariants.tsx (HeroCenter, HeroSplit)
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ KineticHeadline.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BentoGrid.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Stats.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ LogoCloud.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Marquee.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ProcessSteps.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FeatureSplit.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pricing.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Comparison.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FAQ.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CTASection.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ TeamGrid.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BlogList.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CaseStudyCard.tsx (CaseStudyGrid)
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ index.ts
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ local/               Local-business specific
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ HeroWithPhoto.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ StickyPhoneCTA.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ TrustBadges.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ServiceCards.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ TestimonialCarousel.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ MapEmbed.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ GalleryGrid.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ NAPFooter.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ReviewCTA.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BeforeAfterSlider.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ QuickActions.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ EmergencyBanner.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ SpeedDial.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ LocalSchemaGenerator.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ BookingEmbed.tsx
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ui/                  Primitives
в”Ӯ       в”ңв”Җв”Җ button.tsx
в”Ӯ       в””в”Җв”Җ card.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ pages/                   15 routes
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Home.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ About.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Services.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Pricing.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ FAQ.tsx

в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ BlogPost.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Team.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ CaseStudies.tsx

в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Privacy.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Terms.tsx
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ Accessibility.tsx
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ NotFound.tsx
в”ңв”Җв”Җ lib/
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ businessSchema.ts    JSON-LD graph builder
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ altText.ts           Alt-text dedupe / derive
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ cursor.ts            Click-ripple cursor
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ utils.ts             cn() вҖ” tailwind-merge
в””в”Җв”Җ hooks/
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ useSEO.ts
    в””в”Җв”Җ useInView.ts
public/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ site.webmanifest         PWA manifest (full kit)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ robots.txt               Per-crawler allowlist
в”ңв”Җв”Җ sitemap.xml              All 12 public routes with lastmod
в”ңв”Җв”Җ llms.txt                 LLM index
в”ңв”Җв”Җ llms-full.txt            This file
в”ңв”Җв”Җ sw.js                    Service worker
в”ңв”Җв”Җ offline.html             Offline fallback
в”ңв”Җв”Җ 404.html, 500.html       Static error pages
в”ңв”Җв”Җ browserconfig.xml        Windows tile
в””в”Җв”Җ .well-known/
    в””в”Җв”Җ security.txt
index.html                   Meta + OG + Speculation Rules + Fonts
package.json                 Deps + scripts
tailwind.config.ts           Tailwind config (reads CSS vars)
tsconfig.json                TS config
vite.config.ts               Vite config
postcss.config.js            PostCSS + Tailwind + autoprefixer
```

---

## Brand-token schema (`_brand.json`)

W3C DTCG format. Every leaf has `$value`, optional `$type`, optional `$description`. Aliases via `{path.to.token}` syntax.

### business.*

| Key | Type | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | string | Display name, 15-40 chars |
| `shortName` | string | PWA install + nav, 4-12 chars |
| `tagline` | string | Eyebrow line, 3-5 words |
| `description` | string | Meta description, 120-156 chars |
| `url` | string | Canonical URL |
| `businessClass` | enum | `storefront\|restaurant\|medical\|retail\|salon\|gym\|auto-repair\|saas\|portfolio\|nonprofit\|legal\|organization` |
| `email`, `phone`, `address`, `hours` | string | Contact info |

### color.*

```
brandHue       0-360       Master OKLCH hue
brandChroma    0.05-0.30   Saturation
primary        color       oklch(0.62 {chroma} {hue})
primaryHover   color       oklch(0.56 {chroma} {hue})
accent         color       Independent highlight вҖ” typically complementary to hue
accentHover    color
background     color       oklch(0.08 0.02 {hue}) dark / oklch(0.99 0.005 {hue}) light
surface        color       Cards / panels
surfaceElevated color      Elevated panels
border         color       Borders / dividers
text           color       Primary text
textMuted      color       Secondary text
textSubtle     color       Tertiary text
success        color       Green
warning        color       Amber
danger         color       Red
info           color       Blue
```

### colorScheme

`dark | light | auto`

### font.*

```
heading      string       Display font (Google Font name)
body         string       Body font
mono         string       Mono font
weights      number[]     Weights to load
fluidScale   string       `clamp | step | fixed`
```

### features.*

Boolean kill-switches. Read via `featureOn(key)` in code.

```
hero, bento, stats, services, process, testimonials,
logoCloud, pricing, faq, blog, team, caseStudies,
newsletter, cta
```

### Other top-level

```
radius.*        sm | md | lg | xl | 2xl | full
spacing.*       0 1 2 3 4 6 8 12 16 24 32 (rem multiples of 0.25)
shadow.*        sm | md | lg | glow
motion.easing   cubic-bezier
motion.duration fast | base | slow | scroll
layout.*        containerWide | containerNormal | containerProse
social.*        facebook | instagram | linkedin | twitter | youtube | tiktok | github
```

---

## Route table (15 routes)

| Path | File | Purpose | JSON-LD emitted |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `/` | `pages/Home.tsx` | Compose hero + bento + stats + features + process + pricing + FAQ + CTA | Org + WebSite + WebPage + Breadcrumb + FAQPage |
| `/about` | `pages/About.tsx` | Story + mission + stats | AboutPage |
| `/services` | `pages/Services.tsx` | Service grid + CTA | Service |
| `/pricing` | `pages/Pricing.tsx` | Tiers + comparison + FAQ + CTA | Product Г— tiers + FAQPage |
| `/faq` | `pages/FAQ.tsx` | Grouped FAQs | FAQPage Г— N |
| `/blog` | `pages/Blog.tsx` | Featured + grid | вҖ” |
| `/blog/:slug` | `pages/BlogPost.tsx` | Article | BlogPosting |
| `/team` | `pages/Team.tsx` | Member grid | Person[] |
| `/case-studies` | `pages/CaseStudies.tsx` | Portfolio grid | вҖ” |
| `/case-studies/:slug` | `pages/BlogPost.tsx` (reused) | Detail | BlogPosting |
| `/contact` | `pages/Contact.tsx` | Form + NAP | ContactPage |
| `/privacy` | `pages/Privacy.tsx` | Policy | вҖ” |
| `/terms` | `pages/Terms.tsx` | Terms | вҖ” |
| `/accessibility` | `pages/Accessibility.tsx` | WCAG statement | вҖ” |
| `*` | `pages/NotFound.tsx` | 404 | вҖ” |

---

## Section component reference

### HeroCenter

Centered hero with cinematic backdrop + `KineticHeadline`.

```ts
{
  eyebrow?: string;
  headline: string;
  subheadline?: string;
  primary?: { label: string; href: string };
  secondary?: { label: string; href: string };
  trustBadges?: { icon?: 'star'|'shield'|'award'; label: string }[];
  className?: string;
}
```

### HeroSplit

Two-column hero: copy + image.

```ts
{ /* same as HeroCenter */ image: { src: string; alt: string }; imagePosition?: 'left'|'right' }
```

### KineticHeadline

Scroll-driven variable-font headline.

```ts
{ text: string; eyebrow?: string; as?: 'h1'|'h2'|'h3'; className?: string }
```

### BentoGrid

Asymmetric 12-col grid with subgrid alignment. First tile auto-promotes to hero cell.

```ts
{
  tiles: { id: string; title: string; description?: string; icon?: ReactNode;
           image?: string; imageAlt?: string; href?: string;
           span?: 'sm'|'md'|'lg'|'xl'; tall?: boolean; accent?: boolean }[];
  eyebrow?: string; headline?: string; description?: string;
}
```

Span maps to desktop cols: `sm=4`, `md=6`, `lg=8`, `xl=12`. Mobile collapses to 1-col.

### Stats

Animated count-up rollup.

```ts
{ stats: { value: number; suffix?: string; label: string; caption?: string }[];
  columns?: 2|3|4; eyebrow?: string; headline?: string }
```

### LogoCloud

Logo strip вҖ” marquee or grid variant.

```ts
{ logos: { name: string; src?: string; href?: string }[];
  variant?: 'marquee'|'grid'; eyebrow?: string; headline?: string }
```

### Marquee

Generic infinite scroller. Reduced-motion-safe, hover-pausable.

```ts
{ items: ReactNode[]; speed?: 'slow'|'normal'|'fast'; reverse?: boolean; pauseOnHover?: boolean }
```

### ProcessSteps

Numbered "how it works" cards.

```ts
{ steps: { title: string; description: string; icon?: ReactNode }[];
  eyebrow?: string; headline?: string; description?: string }
```

### FeatureSplit

Image-left or image-right copy block.

```ts
{ eyebrow?: string; headline: string; description: string;
  bullets?: string[]; image?: { src: string; alt: string };
  visual?: ReactNode; cta?: { label: string; href: string };
  imagePosition?: 'left'|'right' }
```

### Pricing

3-tier pricing with monthly/yearly toggle. Emits Product JSON-LD per tier.

```ts
{ tiers: PricingTier[]; eyebrow?: string; headline?: string;
  description?: string; showToggle?: boolean }
```

`PricingTier`:

```ts
{ id: string; name: string; description: string;
  monthly: number; yearly: number; currency?: string;
  features: string[]; cta?: { label: string; href: string };
  featured?: boolean; badge?: string }
```

### Comparison

Feature comparison table.

```ts
{ columns: string[]; rows: ComparisonRow[];
  highlightColumn?: number; eyebrow?: string; headline?: string }
```

Row values: `true | false | 'partial' | string`.

### FAQ

Disclosure widget. Emits FAQPage JSON-LD (highest AI-citation rate).

```ts
{ items: { question: string; answer: string }[];
  exclusive?: boolean; eyebrow?: string; headline?: string; description?: string }
```

### CTASection

Closer block.

```ts
{ headline: string; description?: string;
  primary?: { label: string; href: string };
  secondary?: { label: string; href: string };
  eyebrow?: string; tone?: 'emphatic'|'quiet' }
```

### TeamGrid

Member cards. Emits Person JSON-LD per member.

```ts
{ members: { name: string; role: string; bio?: string;
             photo?: string; links?: { label: string; href: string }[] }[];
  eyebrow?: string; headline?: string; description?: string }
```

### BlogList

Featured + grid posts. First post promotes to hero card.

```ts
{ posts: { slug: string; title: string; excerpt: string; date: string;
           author?: string; category?: string; cover?: string; readMinutes?: number }[];
  eyebrow?: string; headline?: string; basePath?: string }
```

### CaseStudyGrid

Portfolio grid with up-to-3 metrics per study.

```ts
{ studies: { slug: string; title: string; client: string;
             summary: string; industry?: string; cover?: string;
             metrics?: { value: string; label: string }[] }[];
  eyebrow?: string; headline?: string; basePath?: string }
```

---

## Tailwind utility tokens

Colors via Tailwind utilities, reading CSS vars:

```
bg-background        --color-background
bg-surface           --color-surface
bg-surface-elevated  --color-surface-elevated
bg-primary           --color-primary
bg-accent            --color-accent
text-text            --color-text
text-text-muted      --color-text-muted
text-text-subtle     --color-text-subtle
border-border        --color-border
text-success         --color-success
text-warning         --color-warning
text-danger          --color-danger
text-info            --color-info
```

Fonts: `font-heading`, `font-body`, `font-mono`.
Fluid type: `text-fluid-xl` through `text-fluid-5xl`.
Radii: `rounded-sm` through `rounded-2xl`.
Easing: `ease-brand`.
Duration: `duration-fast`, `duration-base`, `duration-slow`.
Containers: `max-w-container-wide` (80rem), `max-w-container-normal` (64rem), `max-w-container-prose` (42rem).

---

## CSS utilities (custom, in src/index.css)

| Class | Purpose |
| --- | --- |
| `.glass` | Translucent surface with backdrop-filter blur |
| `.glass-strong` | Stronger glass variant |
| `.card-tactile` | Sharp tactile-brutalism card |
| `.grain` | Subtle film-grain overlay |
| `.gradient-text` | Brand-gradient text fill |
| `.underline-hover` | Animated underline on hover/focus |
| `.interactive-4` | 4-state interactive transitions |
| `.kinetic-headline` | Scroll-driven variable-font |
| `.reveal-on-view` | Scroll-into-view reveal |
| `.bento` | 12-col bento grid container |
| `.bento-sm/.bento-md/.bento-lg/.bento-xl` | Tile span |
| `.bento-tall` | Double row span |
| `.marquee`, `.marquee__track` | Infinite scroller |
| `.cmdk-overlay`, `.cmdk-panel`, `.cmdk-input`, `.cmdk-item`, `.cmdk-kbd` | Cmd+K palette |
| `.cursor-ripple` | Click-ripple cursor effect |

---

## PWA manifest features

- `display: standalone` with `display_override: ['window-controls-overlay', 'standalone', 'minimal-ui']`
- `shortcuts[]` вҖ” Contact / Services / Pricing quick actions
- `share_target` вҖ” handle shared text вҶ’ contact form prefill
- `screenshots[]` вҖ” wide + narrow form factors
- Maskable + any-purpose icons at 16 / 32 / 180 / 192 / 512
- `theme_color` + `background_color` from brand

---

## Robots.txt crawler policy

Explicit Allow / Disallow per crawler:

- вң… GPTBot, ChatGPT-User, OAI-SearchBot (OpenAI)
- вң… ClaudeBot, Claude-User, Claude-SearchBot, anthropic-ai (Anthropic)
- вң… PerplexityBot, Perplexity-User (Perplexity)
- вң… Google-Extended (Gemini training)
- вң… Applebot-Extended (Apple AI training)
- вң… CCBot (Common Crawl)
- вң… FacebookBot (Meta Llama)
- вқҢ Bytespider, ImagesiftBot (aggressive scrapers)

---

## Speculation Rules

Inline `<script type="speculationrules">` in `index.html` prerenders same-origin links on hover (Chrome 121+, `eagerness: moderate`).

Add `data-no-prerender` to any link you don't want prerendered.

---

## View Transitions

CSS `@view-transition { navigation: auto; }` provides cross-fade between routes (same-document SPA + cross-document MPA). Respects `prefers-reduced-motion`.

---

## Cmd+K palette behavior

- вҢҳK / Ctrl+K opens palette + focuses input on first frame (`requestAnimationFrame`)
- Open + вҢҳK re-focuses + selects existing query (toggle-friendly)
- Esc closes + returns focus to trigger element
- Arrow keys navigate, Enter activates, Home/End jump
- Default actions: all 15 routes + theme toggle
- Extensible via `<CommandPalette extra={[...]} />`

---

## Customization protocol (5 steps)

1. Edit `_brand.json` вҖ” business + color + features
2. Replace `{PLACEHOLDER}` in `src/pages/*.tsx` with real copy
3. Update `index.html` title + meta + OG image URL
4. Update `public/site.webmanifest`, `robots.txt`, `sitemap.xml`, `llms.txt`
5. Run `npm install && npm run build`

---

## Quality bar

- LCP вүӨ 2.5s, INP вүӨ 200ms, CLS вүӨ 0.1
- Lighthouse Perf вүҘ 90, A11y вүҘ 95, SEO вүҘ 95
- axe-core violations: 0
- Console errors: 0
- `{PLACEHOLDER}` strings in production: 0
- JSON-LD blocks per page: вүҘ 5
- JS bundle (gzip): вүӨ 250 KB per route

---

## Build verification

```bash
npm install
npm run typecheck   # tsc -b --noEmit; 0 errors
npm run build       # tsc -b && vite build; 0 errors
npm run dev         # localhost:5173 returns HTTP 200
```

Current v3.0 state: 360 KB JS (106 KB gzip), 127 KB CSS (17 KB gzip), 0 TS errors, 1576 modules transformed.

---

## Industry presets (drop-in `_brand.json` variants)

Located in `examples/`:

- `_brand.saas.json` вҖ” indigo, dark, pricing + bento + logoCloud + blog
- `_brand.restaurant.json` вҖ” amber, light, services + testimonials + FAQ
- `_brand.portfolio.json` вҖ” violet, dark, caseStudies + team + process
- `_brand.agency.json` вҖ” bold red, dark, caseStudies + team + logoCloud
- `_brand.medical.json` вҖ” calming blue, light, services + FAQ + team
- `_brand.legal.json` вҖ” navy serif, light, services + team + FAQ
- `_brand.nonprofit.json` вҖ” hopeful green, light, stats + caseStudies + newsletter
- `_brand.retail.json` вҖ” editorial rose, light, bento + newsletter + FAQ
- `_brand.local-service.json` вҖ” dependable blue, light, services + stickyPhone + FAQ

Switch preset:

```bash
cp examples/_brand.saas.json _brand.json
```

---

## Stack rationale (full ADRs in docs/DECISIONS.md)

- **Vite + React 18** вҖ” simplest deploy, WebContainer-compatible
- **Tailwind 3** (not v4) вҖ” stable + widely-tooled; will migrate when v4 ecosystem catches up
- **OKLCH** вҖ” perceptually uniform, Display P3 ready
- **PhotoSwipe v5** вҖ” no containing-block bugs vs YARL
- **Inline Cmd+K** вҖ” ~150 LOC vs adding cmdk dep
- **Section composition** вҖ” flexibility > pre-baked page templates
- **Feature flags in `_brand.json`** вҖ” colocated with brand identity
- **W3C DTCG tokens** вҖ” industry standard, vendor-neutral
- **AGENTS.md** вҖ” cross-IDE contract per Linux Foundation spec
- **No SSR** вҖ” marketing sites work fine as SPAs; SEO covered by JSON-LD + Speculation Rules

---

## What this template does NOT do

- вқҢ SSR / RSC / ISR
- вқҢ Authentication (add Clerk / Auth.js downstream)
- вқҢ Database (add libsql / D1 / Supabase downstream)
- вқҢ Payments (link to Stripe Checkout)
- вқҢ CMS (content lives in TS files; swap for headless CMS downstream)
- вқҢ Email sending (Newsletter POSTs to /api/newsletter вҖ” implement backend)

Each omission is an explicit decision. Don't shoehorn these in without an ADR.

---
